title: Moon Phase Clock
description: Sneak while holding a clock to determine the current moon phase!
body:
**Introduction**\
It has always been a dream of mine to create an item that shows you the moon phase since there is no easy way to do so in Vanilla. To my surprise, while playing around with the newly added item model types, I noticed there was a moon phase property which basically allows you to have specific item textures based on what moon phase it currently is in the game. So guess what I did - I made an item that shows you the moon phase (when you sneak, another amazing property that came with 1.21.4)!

**Modified features**\
When sneaking, clocks show the current moon phase instead of the current daytime

**Issues and feedback**\
If you encounter any problems with the pack or would like to leave any other feedback, feel free to contact me on Discord: @miau_the_cat
